text.title: Hybrid Delivery Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Hybrid Delivery methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-components
step.action: Enumerate components; tag each with risk profile.

step.name: assign-methods
step.action: Assign Predictive / Agile / Hybrid per component with evidence.

step.name: name-boundaries
step.action: For each method change between components, name the boundary + input/output contract.

step.name: set-governance-cadence
step.action: Lock program-level gates; require agile components to report into the gate cycle.

step.name: publish-adr-and-walk
step.action: Walk the ADR with each component lead; collect dissents into an addendum; publish.
